title: tecoma filicifolia
intro: Tecoma filicifolia, also known as the Orange Trumpet Vine or Mexican Buckeye, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues due to its expectorant and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Tecoma filicifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Tecoma filicifolia include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
